notes: Seti Astro Suite Pro V1.12.0 Introducing Workflows in SASpro. Find it under the Menu bar Workflows. Workflows are to help guide you in your processing, load up a pre canned workflow if you have no idea where to start your processing journey, create your own, or even share workflows with each other!. Cosmic Clarity DarkStar AI4: Major upgrade to DarkStar bringing my AI4 architecture to star removal.
